title: Group Filter on "My Work" View
excerpt: Would be awesome to see a group Filter on “My Work” View like on boards. My sales pipeline has a group of Lost sales deals, that do not have a new follow up date like our warm leads. Since there is no way to remove these…

posts.author: jproductions (Justin )
posts.cookedHtml: Would be awesome to see a group Filter on “My Work” View like on boards. My sales pipeline has a group of Lost sales deals, that do not have a new follow up date like our warm leads. Since there is no way to remove these from “My work”, old deals are clogging the “without a date” group. Would love to be able to get rid of these!

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @jproductions and welcome to the community!

I hope you like it here

Thank you for that feedback / feature request.

I will share it with our team

Cheers,
-Matias
